summary: Completed full backend + frontend e2e testing for KiraFix marketing site. 7/7 backend pytest tests passed (root, health, contact CRUD with persistence, contact invalid email 422, contact missing-required 422, newsletter create + idempotency, newsletter invalid email 422). Frontend: all 5 routes load with correct hero testids, all desktop nav links navigate correctly, nav-cta-discovery navigates to /contact, mobile menu toggle + nav-mobile-link-about works at 500px viewport, home pillars (01-03) + case-card-0/1 render, KiraFix phase-0..3 render, service-toggle-0/1 accordion buttons clickable, contact form happy path submits and shows contact-success 'Thank you', newsletter footer shows success toast, footer-linkedin/instagram/web have correct hrefs (linkedin.com/in/seemabassi-hopper, instagram.com/Hopper_Learning, hoppermodern.com). No console errors observed.

issues: service-toggle buttons do not expose aria-expanded attribute — minor a11y improvement; functionality works

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Add aria-expanded to service-toggle accordion buttons on /kirafix for accessibility.

(Optional) Backend logger.info on /api/contact is called after logger is defined later in the file — works because logger module-level is set up before any request, but consider moving logging.basicConfig above the route handlers for clarity.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is referenced inside create_contact (line 78) but logging.basicConfig/logger initialization is at the bottom of the file (lines 122-126). Since it executes at import time before any requests, it works, but the ordering is fragile and confusing — move logging setup above the routes.
server.py: CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers reject this combination; if real cross-origin credentialed requests are ever needed, set explicit origins.
server.py: created_at is stored as ISO string in Mongo but parsed back to datetime on GET; consider storing as BSON datetime for native sort + range queries.
Contact list endpoint has no auth — anyone can read all inquiries via GET /api/contact. Mark as TODO before production launch.
Frontend Toaster uses sonner properly; contact form success state is well-handled.
All key interactive elements have data-testid attributes — testability is excellent.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed contact inquiries and random newsletter signups in test_database (not cleaned up; safe per problem statement, marketing-site inquiries).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_kirafix_api.py covers root, health, contact (POST/GET happy + 422 invalid email + 422 missing required), newsletter (POST happy + idempotency + 422 invalid). Frontend testids verified: home-hero/about-hero/kirafix-hero/cases-hero/contact-hero, nav-link-*, nav-cta-discovery, nav-mobile-toggle, nav-mobile-menu, nav-mobile-link-about, pillar-01/02/03, case-card-0/1, phase-0..3, service-toggle-0..5, contact-name-input/email-input/company-input/role-input/inquiry-type (native <select>)/message-input/submit-btn, contact-success, newsletter-email-input/submit-btn, footer-linkedin/instagram/web. Contact form inquiry-type is a native HTML select (use page.select_option), not shadcn Select.
